utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: provided as 'Lisbon, Portugal' (sufficient). 2) travel_dates: 'October 15 - October 19, 2024' (specific dates provided). 3) transportation: requires flight details with costs; given 'Round trip flights from Berlin with a Budget Airline, Economy Class' and cost '€150' (origin city, class, round trip, cost included; airline not named but 'Budget Airline' may be too generic—however format only says flight details with costs, not specific airline, so acceptable). 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs; provided '4 nights at the Adventure Lodge' and cost '€220' (name given; adequate). 5) activities: selected activities with costs; three listed with individual costs (adequate). 6) additional_services: any extra services with costs; provided as 'None' (acceptable). 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown; provided as '€480' total, but not itemized breakdown beyond individual items. However, since each item also lists cost, this effectively constitutes a breakdown, and the total is consistent. Therefore all 7 are covered.
